description_long: This is a compact, rectangular microwave oven with a sleek, dark metallic exterior and a large, black-tinted glass door dominating the front. The right side of the front panel features a digital control display, three rotary dials, and a prominent red button, all arranged vertically for easy access. The door is bordered by a metallic frame and includes a horizontal handle at the top, designed for ergonomic gripping. The sides and back of the microwave are solid, with the left and right panels featuring horizontal ventilation slits for heat dissipation, while the rear has a larger vented area and two protruding cylindrical feet. The top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing lightweight objects. The overall design is modern and functional, with clear attention to user interaction and safety.
description: A modern, dark metallic microwave oven with a large glass door, digital control panel, and side ventilation slits. The design is compact, sleek, and user-friendly.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass door, metallic frame, digital control panel with display, three rotary dials, and a red button.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid dark panel with horizontal ventilation slits and the protruding handle at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large vented area, two cylindrical feet, and the overall boxy structure.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain dark panel, horizontal ventilation slits, and the rear handle visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring a digital display at the top, followed by three rotary dials and a single red button. The display is rectangular and backlit, showing time and settings, while the dials are circular and evenly spaced. There are no visible touchpads.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a horizontal bar located at the top of the door, made of metallic material, and designed for easy gripping. It is integrated into the door frame and extends slightly outward for ergonomic use.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are present as horizontal slits on both the left and right side panels, and a large vented area is located on the rear panel. The side vents are narrow and evenly spaced, while the rear vent is larger and more complex in pattern.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular, black-tinted glass window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing visibility into the microwave's interior.
